overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long dining tables filled with students, and massive stained glass windows at the far end. The camera holds a steady first-person view from the entrance, capturing the warm atmospheric lighting and detailed stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: standing at the entrance observing the great hall and students at their tables

entered.detail: cluster of floating magical candles suspended in mid-air along the left side of the hall
cluster of floating magical candles suspended in mid-air along the right side of the hall
large ornate stained glass window with colorful panes at the far end of the hall
tall gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
long wooden house tables with benches arranged in rows along the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students are seated at long wooden dining tables in the center, while massive stone pillars line the sides and a large stained glass window dominates the far wall. The warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere in this game-engine rendered environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, immersive perspective within a magnificent gothic great hall that radiates a warm, magical glow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the chamber, where thousands of floating candles cast a flickering light over the detailed stone architecture. As the view lingers, the focus settles on students seated at long wooden dining tables that stretch toward the center of the room. The scene then expands to reveal massive stone pillars lining the perimeter before finally drawing the eye toward a large, dominant stained glass window at the far wall.
